operations.title: Discover Analytics Context
operations.summary: Discover allowed Superset datasets, charts, dashboards, metrics, and dimensions without exposing raw analytics tools.

inputs.name: workspace_scope
inputs.summary: Allowed analytics workspace, database, or tenant scope.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which analytics workspace or governed scope should be searched.

inputs.name: query
inputs.summary: Search intent for datasets, dashboards, charts, metrics, or dimensions.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask what analytics asset or metric context the user needs.

inputs.name: asset_type
inputs.summary: Optional asset type filter.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.summary: Maximum catalog results to return.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded provider-specific discovery options such as selected fields or pagination.

operations.title: Answer Governed Analytics Question
operations.summary: Answer an analytics question against allowed datasets and metrics using bounded chart-data or provider-owned semantic execution.

inputs.name: question
inputs.summary: Natural-language analytics question to answer.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for the analytics question when the request is not concrete.

inputs.name: dataset_ref
inputs.summary: Allowed dataset reference to query.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which approved dataset should be used.

inputs.name: metric
inputs.summary: Approved metric to use.

inputs.name: dimension
inputs.summary: Approved grouping dimension.

inputs.name: time_window
inputs.summary: Bounded time window for the answer.

inputs.name: filters
inputs.summary: Governed filters within allowed dataset scope.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.summary: Maximum rows or groups to consider.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded provider-specific query options. Raw SQL is not accepted here.

operations.title: Create Chart Preview
operations.summary: Create a Superset chart preview from governed metric, dimension, and visualization intent without saving it by default.

inputs.name: dataset_ref
inputs.summary: Allowed dataset reference for the chart.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which approved dataset should be charted.

inputs.name: metric
inputs.summary: Approved metric to visualize.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which approved metric should be visualized.

inputs.name: visualization_type
inputs.summary: Requested chart type.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which chart type should be previewed.

inputs.name: dimension
inputs.summary: Approved grouping dimension.

inputs.name: time_window
inputs.summary: Bounded time window for the chart.

inputs.name: filters
inputs.summary: Governed chart filters.

inputs.name: title
inputs.summary: Draft chart title.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded preview rendering options such as output format.

operations.title: Request Chart Publish
operations.summary: Request saving or updating a Superset chart from a reviewed preview.

inputs.name: chart_preview_ref
inputs.summary: Reviewed chart preview reference.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which reviewed chart preview should be saved.

inputs.name: dashboard_scope
inputs.summary: Allowed dashboard or workspace scope for the saved chart.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask where the chart should be published.

inputs.name: reason
inputs.summary: Business reason for publishing the chart.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask why this chart should be saved or updated.

inputs.name: title
inputs.summary: Final chart title.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded chart-save options. Must not bypass approval or dashboard scope.

operations.title: Prepare Dashboard Draft
operations.summary: Prepare a Superset dashboard draft or update proposal without publishing it.

inputs.name: dashboard_scope
inputs.summary: Allowed dashboard, workspace, or team scope.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which dashboard scope should receive the draft.

inputs.name: objective
inputs.summary: Business objective for the dashboard.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask what decision, review, or audience outcome the dashboard draft should support.

inputs.name: chart_refs
inputs.summary: Reviewed chart references to include.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which reviewed chart previews or existing charts should be included.

inputs.name: layout_hint
inputs.summary: Optional layout guidance.

inputs.name: audience
inputs.summary: Intended dashboard audience.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded dashboard draft options. Must not publish without approval.

operations.title: Prepare Dataset Draft
operations.summary: Prepare a virtual dataset or semantic dataset draft under governed data-scope constraints.

inputs.name: database_ref
inputs.summary: Allowed database reference.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which approved database should back the dataset draft.

inputs.name: dataset_purpose
inputs.summary: Business purpose for the dataset or saved query.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask what governed business purpose the dataset draft should serve.

inputs.name: query_intent
inputs.summary: Declarative query intent. Raw SQL is not accepted from agents by default.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for the query intent in business terms rather than accepting raw SQL.

inputs.name: source_tables
inputs.summary: Approved source tables to use.

inputs.name: metrics
inputs.summary: Approved metrics to define or expose.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded dataset draft options. Must not allow arbitrary SQL execution.
